variants.name: SAI1
variants.description: SAI1 clock selected as DFSDM1 Audio clock source

variants.name: SAI2
variants.description: SAI2 clock selected as DFSDM1 Audio clock source

variants.name: LSE
variants.description: LSE clock is selected as HDMI-CEC clock

variants.name: HSI_DIV_488
variants.description: HSI divided by 488 clock is selected as HDMI-CEC clock

variants.name: PCLK2
variants.description: APB2 clock (PCLK2) selected as DFSDM1 Kernel clock source

variants.name: SYS
variants.description: System clock (SYSCLK) clock selected as DFSDM1 Kernel clock source

variants.name: DSI_PHY_DIV_8
variants.description: DSI-PHY used as DSI byte lane clock source (usual case)

variants.name: PLL1_R
variants.description: PLLR used as DSI byte lane clock source, used in case DSI PLL and DSI-PHY are off (low power mode)

variants.name: PCLK1
variants.description: APB clock selected as I2C clock

variants.name: SYS
variants.description: System clock selected as I2C clock

variants.name: HSI
variants.description: HSI clock selected as I2C clock

variants.name: PLLI2S
variants.description: PLLI2S clock used as I2S clock source

variants.name: CKIN
variants.description: External clock mapped on the I2S_CKIN pin used as I2S clock source

variants.name: PCLK1
variants.description: APB1 clock (PCLK1) selected as LPTILM1 clock

variants.name: LSI
variants.description: LSI clock is selected as LPTILM1 clock

variants.name: HSI
variants.description: HSI clock is selected as LPTILM1 clock

variants.name: LSE
variants.description: LSE clock is selected as LPTILM1 clock

variants.name: HSI
variants.description: HSI clock selected as PLL and PLLI2S clock entry

variants.name: HSE
variants.description: HSE oscillator clock selected as PLL and PLLI2S clock entry

variants.name: LSE
variants.description: LSE oscillator clock used as RTC clock

variants.name: LSI
variants.description: LSI oscillator clock used as RTC clock

variants.name: HSE
variants.description: HSE oscillator clock divided by a prescaler used as RTC clock

variants.name: AFIF
variants.description: SAI2 clock frequency = Alternate function input frequency

variants.name: HSI_HSE
variants.description: SAI2 clock frequency = HSI or HSE

variants.name: CLK48
variants.description: 48 MHz clock is selected as SD clock

variants.name: SYS
variants.description: System clock is selected as SD clock

variants.name: HSI
variants.description: HSI oscillator used as system clock

variants.name: HSE
variants.description: HSE oscillator used as system clock

variants.name: Mul2
variants.description: If the APB prescaler is configured 1, TIMxCLK = PCLKx. Otherwise, TIMxCLK = 2xPCLKx

variants.name: Mul4
variants.description: If the APB prescaler is configured 1, 2 or 4, TIMxCLK = HCLK. Otherwise, TIMxCLK = 4xPCLKx

variants.name: PCLK2
variants.description: APB2 clock (PCLK2) is selected as USART clock

variants.name: SYS
variants.description: System clock is selected as USART clock

variants.name: HSI
variants.description: HSI clock is selected as USART clock

variants.name: LSE
variants.description: LSE clock is selected as USART clock

variants.name: PCLK1
variants.description: APB1 clock (PCLK1) is selected as USART clock

variants.name: SYS
variants.description: System clock is selected as USART clock

variants.name: HSI
variants.description: HSI clock is selected as USART clock

variants.name: LSE
variants.description: LSE clock is selected as USART clock
